name: Business PC Deals: December 19, 2002
description: "Take Her Up to 2.4 GHz, Mr. Scott" For the past three months, our reference corporate mainstream desktop model has used a 2.0 GHz Pentium 4 microprocessor. The 2.0 GHz point on the Pentium 4 power spectrum represents the best value in performance and price for the vast majority of enterprise workers.
